sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: HCA 헬스케어, 2025년 4분기 매출 195억 1,300만 달러·희석 EPS 8.14달러로 전년 대비 강한 성장세 시현

keyPoints.text: 4분기 매출은 195억 1,300만 달러로 전년 동기 182억 8,500만 달러 대비 증가했습니다.
희석 주당순이익은 8.14달러로 전년 동기 5.63달러 대비 크게 상승했으며, 순이익은 18억 7,800만 달러였습니다.
동일시설 입원 건수는 2.4%, 동일시설 동등 입원 건수는 2.5% 증가했습니다.

riskChanges.text: 허리케인 헬렌의 노스캐롤라이나 시설 피해 및 허리케인 밀턴의 플로리다 시설 영향으로 수익 손실이 2억 달러 발생했습니다.

businessChanges.text: 경영진은 네트워크 확장, 인력 개발, 임상 역량 강화 투자가 HCA 헬스케어 시스템을 더욱 강화했다고 밝혔습니다.
인디애나 병원 매각 등 시설 처분에서 4,100만 달러의 처분 이익이 발생했습니다.
동일시설 응급실 방문 건수는 0.5% 증가했고, 동일시설 외래 수술 건수는 2.9% 늘었습니다.

financialHighlights.text: 조정 EBITDA는 41억 1,400만 달러로 전년 동기 37억 1,200만 달러 대비 증가했습니다.
영업활동 현금흐름은 23억 5,900만 달러로 전년 동기 25억 5,900만 달러 대비 감소했습니다.
순이익은 18억 7,800만 달러로 전년 동기 14억 3,800만 달러 대비 크게 증가했습니다.
전년 4분기에는 캘리포니아 병원 매각 관련 1억 9,500만 달러의 처분 손실이 반영됐으나, 당 분기에는 이익 전환됐습니다.

watchItems.text: 허리케인 관련 2억 달러 수익 손실은 일회성이나, 자연재해 노출이 큰 지역(플로리다·노스캐롤라이나) 내 리스크는 지속 모니터링이 필요합니다.
2026년 가이던스와 함께 발표된 이번 실적은 전년 대비 전반적 개선을 시사하며, 네트워크 확장 투자 성과가 물량 성장으로 이어지는지 확인이 중요합니다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: EX-99.1 2 hca-ex99_1.htm EX-99.1 EX-99.1 Exhibit 99.1 FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE INVESTOR CONTACT: MEDIA CONTACT: Frank Morgan Harlow Sumerford 615-344-2688 615-344-1851 HCA Healthcare reports FOURTH quarter 2025 results AND PROVIDES 2026 GUIDANCE Nashville, Tenn., January 27, 2026 – HCA Healthcare, Inc. (NYSE: HCA) today announced financial and operating results for the fourth quarter ended December 31, 2025. Key fourth quarter metrics (all percentage changes compare 4Q 2025 to 4Q 2024 unless otherwise noted): • Revenues increased 6.7 percent to $19.513 billion • Net income attributable to HCA Healthcare, Inc. increased 30.6 percent to $1.878 billion • Diluted earnings per  Normalized numeric aliases: $19.513 billion = 195억 1,300만 달러; $1.878 billion = 18억 7,800만 달러; $4.114 billion = 41억 1,400만 달러; $19.513 = 19.513달러; $1.878 = 1.878달러; $8.14 = 8.14달러; $8.01 = 8.01달러; $4.114 = 4.114달러; 30.6 percent = 30.6%; 6.7 percent = 6.7%; 44.6 percent = 44.6%; 28.8 percent = 28.8%; 10.8 percent = 10.8%.

activities totaled $2.359 billion, compared to $2.559 billion in the fourth quarter of 2024 • Same facility admissions increased 2.4 percent and same facility equivalent admissions increased 2.5 percent "We finished 2025 with strong performance consistent with previous quarters. Our investments in network expansion, workforce development, and advancing clinical capabilities further strengthened the HCA Healthcare system. I want to thank our colleagues for their outstanding work, their dedication to our patients, and their unyielding commitment to our mission," said Sam Hazen, Chief Executive Officer of  Normalized numeric aliases: $2.359 billion = 23억 5,900만 달러; $2.559 billion = 25억 5,900만 달러; $19.513 billion = 195억 1,300만 달러; $18.285 billion = 182억 8,500만 달러; $1.878 billion = 18억 7,800만 달러; $1.438 billion = 14억 3,800만 달러; $2.359 = 2.359달러; $2.559 = 2.559달러; $18.285 = 18.285달러; 2.4 percent = 2.4%; $1.878 = 1.878달러; $8.14 = 8.14달러; $1.438 = 1.438달러; $5.63 = 5.63달러; 2.5 percent = 2.5%.

in the fourth quarter of 2024. Results for the fourth quarter of 2025 include gains on sales of facilities of $41 million, or $0.13 per diluted share, primarily related to the sale of a hospital facility in Indiana. Results for the fourth quarter of 2024 included losses on sales of facilities of $195 million, or $0.59 per diluted share, primarily related to the pending sale of a hospital facility in California, which was completed in the second quarter of 2025. For the fourth quarter of 2025, Adjusted EBITDA totaled $4.114 billion, compared to $3.712 billion in the fourth quarter of 2024. Adjusted EBITDA is a non-GAAP financial measure. A table providing supplemental information on Adjusted EBITDA and reconciling net income attributable to HCA  Normalized numeric aliases: $41 million = 4,100만 달러; $195 million = 1억 9,500만 달러; $4.114 billion = 41억 1,400만 달러; $3.712 billion = 37억 1,200만 달러; $41 = 41달러; $0.13 = 0.13달러; $195 = 195달러; $0.59 = 0.59달러; $3.712 = 3.712달러; $4.114 = 4.114달러.

and experienced loss of revenues estimated at $200 million, or $0.60 per diluted share, associated with Hurricane Helene's impact on its North Carolina facilities, as well as from Hurricane Milton, which impacted certain facilities in Florida. Same facility admissions increased 2.4 percent and same facility equivalent admissions increased 2.5 percent in the fourth quarter of 2025 compared to the prior year period. Same facility emergency room visits increased 0.5 percent in the fourth quarter of 2025 compared to the prior year period. Same facility inpatient surgeries were flat, and same facility outpatient surgeries declined 0.5 percent in the fourth quarter of 2025 compared to the same period of 2024. Same facility revenue per equivalent admission increased 2.9 percent in the fourth quarter of 2025 compared to the fourth  Normalized numeric aliases: $200 million = 2억 달러; $200 = 200달러; $0.60 = 0.60달러; 2.4 percent = 2.4%; 2.5 percent = 2.5%; 0.5 percent = 0.5%; 2.9 percent = 2.9%.
